item.title: 0.3.9 beta (build 21)
item.description:
Groovyday 0.3.9 private beta

  • Automatic Compact placement now means the roomier left or right wing beside a bottom Dock
  • Fullscreen Mode and Visualizer controls now live inside the existing player HUD
  • Dock re-anchoring no longer accidentally saves an old corner placement
  • Previous, play/pause, and next controls in Compact mode

This is an opt-in development build for personal testing.
